nodes.label: Introduction to Dangers
nodes.description: Characters learn about the dangers facing Stormwreak Isle

nodes.label: Pursuit
nodes.description: Two residents flee while being chased by three sailor-zombie attackers

nodes.label: Crash Investigation
nodes.description: Characters learn about mysterious shipwrecks and are encouraged to investigate causes

nodes.label: Compass Rose Revelation
nodes.description: Runara directs attention to the ancient wreck of Compass Rose as potential answers

nodes.label: Rescue Scenario
nodes.description: Characters awaken in the temple after being rescued by Runara

nodes.label: Tide Shift Mechanics
nodes.description: Description of tidal patterns affecting access to submerged sections of the caves

nodes.label: Stirge Join Battle
nodes.description: Two stirge cling to the tunnel ceiling and join combat if fighting erupts in this area

nodes.label: Mushroom Stirs
nodes.description: A sickly-looking mushroom stirs to life and extends tendrils toward the party.

nodes.label: Discovery of Heart Cap Mushrooms
nodes.description: Characters discover heart cap mushrooms requiring a skill check to harvest.

nodes.label: Vigilant Defense
nodes.description: Conscious myconids aggressively defend against unescorted intruders

nodes.label: Meld State
nodes.description: Four myconids enter a shared transcendental trance state

nodes.label: Defense of Sinensa
nodes.description: Myconid Adults attack intruders lacking fellow myconids while protecting their unconscious leader

nodes.label: Fume_Drake_Encounter
nodes.description: Two Fume Drake attack intruders in the cave

nodes.label: Blight_Source_Discovered
nodes.description: Characters identify the tomb of Sharruth as the source of the blight

nodes.label: Fissure_Blocked_By_Crystal
nodes.description: The fissure is blocked by an orange crystal emitting light

nodes.label: Breaking_Fire_Crystal
nodes.description: Destroying the orange crystal stops the blight and releases a fire snake.

nodes.label: Fire_Snake_Encounter
nodes.description: A fire snake emerges from the shattered crystal and attacks the characters.

nodes.label: Sunlight_Refractive_Effect
nodes.description: Crystals refract sunlight, flooding the cave with brilliant illumination.

nodes.label: Third Fume Drake Appearance
nodes.description: A third fume drake emerges in the room when the characters first arrive.

nodes.label: Fire Snake Hatch and Additional Fume Drakes
nodes.description: As the fire snake hatches from its egg, two more fume drakes emerge from the purple crystals.

edges.description: Characters learn about the dangers facing Stormwreak Isle
Two residents flee while being chased by three sailor-zombie attackers
Characters learn about mysterious shipwrecks and are encouraged to investigate causes
Runara directs attention to the ancient wreck of Compass Rose as potential answers
Characters awaken in the temple after being rescued by Runara
Description of tidal patterns affecting access to submerged sections of the caves
Two stirge cling to the tunnel ceiling and join combat if fighting erupts in this area
A sickly-looking mushroom stirs to life and extends tendrils toward the party.
Characters discover heart cap mushrooms requiring a skill check to harvest.
Conscious myconids aggressively defend against unescorted intruders
Four myconids enter a shared transcendental trance state
Myconid Adults attack intruders lacking fellow myconids while protecting their unconscious leader
Two Fume Drake attack intruders in the cave
Characters identify the tomb of Sharruth as the source of the blight
The fissure is blocked by an orange crystal emitting light
Destroying the orange crystal stops the blight and releases a fire snake.
A fire snake emerges from the shattered crystal and attacks the characters.
Crystals refract sunlight, flooding the cave with brilliant illumination.
A third fume drake emerges in the room when the characters first arrive.
As the fire snake hatches from its egg, two more fume drakes emerge from the purple crystals.

edges.desc: Shipwreck located on the island
Observatory situated on the southeastern portion of the island
Temple located on the island
Graveyard atop cliffs
Cliffs at northern point of island
Dragon's Rest situated on island
The shipwreck contains the bones of a gold dragon, implying proximity to Runara
Runara’s actions influenced the shipwreck area due to dragon-related events
Neatly tied to the dock
Animated corpses of sailors who died in the shipwreck
Zombies are associated with the shipwreck location
Zombies are present in the temple
Elder Runara aids against zombies
Sells equipment at the temple
Leads the cloister's community
Elder Runara is the leader of Dragon's Rest
Residents mistakenly believe she resides in the temple at the top of the island
Zombies guard the entrance (implied by contextual references to combat at the beach)
His prized possession is an ordinary dagger
Lives in the ruins
Serves as Myla's helper
Live near the island
Uses tools to maintain the temple
Has a set of mason's tools
The fourth cell is Myla's
Next to the vacant cell is Tarak cell
Next to Tarak cell is Varnoth
Spends nearly half her time here, studying, copying, and annotating the library's collection
Come here to read and discuss various works
Come here to read and discuss various works
Described as studious
Tends and maintains the temple
Assists Runara in maintaining the temple
Assists Runara in maintaining the temple
Helps maintain the temple
Helps maintain the temple
Believes magical dagger saved him
Suspected source of zombies (Runara’s claim)
Gives to characters
Asks the characters to visit the caves and retrieve heart cap mushrooms
Lives at the cloister
Present on the beach
Mentor relationship (studied with her)
Winged kobold participates in the ambush
Leader of the myconids resides in the fungal farms
Nesting in the fungal caves
Stirges patrol the area near the fungal caves
Exchanged goods with the fungal dwellers
Mentioning Tarak's name grants advantage on persuasion checks with myconids, implying a prior beneficial relationship with Sinensa.
Sinensa is identified as the leader of the myconid sprouts, extending to the broader myconid community.
The bulbous object is a stirge nest
Gathered for use in area B2 (implied storage within the chamber)
Sprouts flee toward area B4 during threats
Released from the stony egg formed by the shattered crystal
A harpy settled into the wreck of Compass Rose
Some zombies have been trapped in the wreck for years
Found in the shipwrecks
Found in the shipwrecks
Looking for another ship to lure onto the rocks
Returns after the characters have spent some time aboard
The zombie is in area C4
Engraved with mother-of-pearl in the wheel (implied proximity to location)
A pouch containing 50 gp, a set of cartographer's tools, and a dagger is held in the desk
A set of cartographer's tools is held in the desk
A dagger is held in the desk
Lurks in the aft part of the hold
Competes with zombies for attention during combat
Contains a pouch with 55 gp and three Turquoise
Pair of boots of elvenkind stored in the chest
Three Turquoise stored in the chest
Imprisoned by Sparkrender
Was tutoring Aidron until he left
Engaged in battle with stirges in the area
Engaged in battle with winged kobold in the area
She is the kobold tinkerer at Dragon's Rest
Brothers of Myla
Brother of Myla
Brother of Myla
Sworn loyalty to Sparkrender
Sworn loyalty to Sparkrender
Winged kobolds engage in battle within the plaza
Two Winged Kobold (Nuhro and Snirke) inhabit this camp
The kobold camp is guarded by Winged Kobold
The journal is locked with an ornate lock
The dagger is used to scratch the rune to unlock the journal
The journal is hidden in the observatory tower
The journal contains star maps
The journal contains notes on experiments with magic
The journal contains a passage that indicates the hidden entrance
The magical trap triggers release of noxious green gas
Imprisoned in the secret library below
Sleeping in the observatory tower
Discovered through a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check
Discovered through a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check
Detect magic reveals the location of the +1 battleaxe without an ability check
Detect magic reveals the location of the hold person spell scroll without an ability check
Lurk here during the ritual
Sparkrender seeks assistance from Aidron (bronze dragon wyrmling) to complete the ritual
Gives as a reward
